media.title: Media library
media.subtitle: Upload and keep your photos and videos — independent of posts.
media.empty: No media yet. Upload a photo or video.
media.deleteConfirm: Delete this media? Posts you already shared it to will stay.
media.pickerHint: Pick which media you want to add.

search.title: Search
search.subtitle: Find people, groups and posts.
search.empty: Start typing in the search box above.

composer.mediaUnsupported: Only images (JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF) or videos (MP4, WebM) are allowed.
composer.mediaTooLargeImage: The image is too large (max 5 MB).
composer.mediaTooLargeVideo: The video is too large (max 50 MB).
composer.mediaTooMany: You can attach up to 10 media items per post.

posts.empty: You haven't posted anything yet. Share your first post above.

friends.title: Friends
friends.subtitle: Manage your friends and pending requests.
friends.friendsEmpty: You don't have any friends yet. Find people on the "People" tab.
friends.peopleSearchPlaceholder: Search people by name or email…

follow.title: Following
follow.subtitle: Follow creators and public figures — one-directional.
follow.followingEmpty: You're not following anyone yet. Find people on the "Friends → People" tab.
follow.followersEmpty: No one is following you yet.

groups.title: Groups
groups.subtitle: Create or join groups and post to their members.
groups.logoHint: Optional. If left empty, a monogram from the name is shown.
groups.publicHint: Anyone can join and becomes a member instantly.
groups.privateHint: Joining is approved by an admin.
groups.mineEmpty: You're not a member of any group yet. Discover groups on the "Discover" tab.
groups.postsEmpty: No posts in this group yet. Be the first!

feed.emptySubtitle: Posts from your friends, followed creators and groups will appear here in chronological order — newest first.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Your friend requests, follows and new posts.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your language, notifications, privacy and security.
settings.searchable: Show me in search and discovery
settings.hidePresenceHint: Changes to presence take effect the next time you reconnect.
settings.changePasswordHint: Changing your password signs you out of all sessions.
settings.twoFactorDesc: Add a second step at sign-in using an authenticator app (TOTP).
settings.scanQr: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code.
settings.enterCodeToDisable: Enter a code to disable two-factor
settings.recoveryCodesHint: Save these recovery codes somewhere safe — each can be used once if you lose your authenticator.

userProfile.noPosts: This user hasn't posted anything public yet.

chat.title: Messages
chat.empty: No conversations yet. Start one from a profile or a group.
chat.selectConversation: Select a conversation to open it.
chat.noMessages: No messages in this conversation yet.

right.noFriends: You don't have any friends yet.

page.comingSoonHint: The "{{section}}" feature will be built in a later card.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your name, bio and avatar.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell others a bit about yourself…
profile.avatarHint: JPG, PNG, WebP or GIF, up to 5 MB.
profile.cropHint: Drag to reposition and use the slider to zoom.

billing.title: Subscription
billing.subtitle: Manage your Nexa subscription and billing.
billing.pastDueHint: Your last payment failed. Update your payment method to keep your subscription.
billing.noSubHint: Start your 14-day free trial. No charge until the trial ends — cancel anytime.
billing.planAnnualHint: Billed yearly. Two months free vs. monthly.
billing.trialNote: 14-day free trial · card required · cancel anytime
billing.trialNoteDemo: Demo mode · the trial starts instantly, no card or payment needed
billing.demoMode: Demo mode — subscription managed via the dev panel.
billing.notConfigured: Subscriptions are not available right now. Please try again later.
billing.checkoutFailed: Couldn't open the checkout. Please try again.

paywall.title: Nexa Premium
paywall.neverSubscribed: Subscribe to unlock your feed, posting, chat and calls — no ads, ever.
paywall.lapsedTrial: Your free trial has ended. Subscribe to keep using Nexa.
paywall.canceled: Your subscription has ended. Resubscribe to keep using Nexa.
paywall.paused: Your subscription is paused. Resume it to keep using Nexa.
paywall.note: Reads your own profile and billing stay available.

auth.twoFactorSubtitle: Enter the code from your authenticator app.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.displayNameShort: Display name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.passwordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

error.UNAUTHENTICATED: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
error.UNSUPPORTED_IMAGE_TYPE: Only JPG, PNG, WebP or GIF images are allowed.
error.UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE: Only images (JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF) or videos (MP4, WebM) are allowed.
error.EMPTY_POST: A post needs text or at least one media attachment.
error.PAYLOAD_TOO_LARGE: The uploaded file is too large.
error.INVALID_UPLOAD: The upload could not be completed. Please try again.
error.SELF_FRIEND_REQUEST: You cannot send a friend request to yourself.
error.FRIEND_REQUEST_ALREADY_SENT: You have already sent a request to this user.
error.REVERSE_FRIEND_REQUEST_EXISTS: This user has already sent you a request — accept it on the Requests tab.
error.INVALID_2FA_CHALLENGE: Your two-factor session expired. Please sign in again.
error.NOT_GROUP_MEMBER: You must be a member of this group to do that.
error.GROUP_LAST_ADMIN: You are the only admin — promote another member or remove the others before leaving.
error.NOT_GROUP_ADMIN: Only a group admin can do that.
error.CANNOT_KICK_SELF: You cannot remove yourself — leave the group instead.
error.CANNOT_KICK_ADMIN: You cannot remove a group admin.
error.TARGET_NOT_GROUP_MEMBER: That user is not a member of this group.
error.INVALID_COMMENT_PARENT: The parent comment does not belong to this post.
error.SUBSCRIPTION_NOT_CONFIGURED: Subscriptions are not available right now. Please try again later.
error.NO_SUBSCRIPTION: You don't have a subscription yet.
error.SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED: This needs an active subscription or trial. Subscribe to continue.
error.NETWORK: Could not reach the server. Please try again.
error.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.
